summary.lt: Stomatologijos klinika su patyrusiais specialistais; visapuse dantu prieziura vienoje vietoje; naudojama moderni iranga ir gydymo metodai.
summary.en: Dental clinic with experienced specialists, comprehensive dental care in one place, using modern equipment and treatment methods.

familyCare.lt: Teikiame dantu prieziura suaugusiems ir vaikams.
familyCare.en: We provide dental care for both adults and children.

fullService.lt: Skirtingu sriciu specialistai ir klinikos laboratorija — visa gydymo grandine galima vienoje vietoje.
fullService.en: Multiple specialists and an in-house lab—full treatment pathway in one place.

teamSummary.lt: Kvalifikuoti specialistai tiek paprastiems, tiek sudetingesniems atvejams.
teamSummary.en: A team of qualified dental specialists for both routine and complex cases.
